chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: ORDER_LINE_ITEM

entities_post_resolution.name: Delivered
entities_post_resolution.definition: Shipment: a logistics record representing a single shipment of goods linked to one Sales Order, identified by a tracking number and associated with a source warehouse.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | | WAREHOUSE_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | Source warehouse | YES | | | TRACKING_NUMBER | VARCHAR(100) | Carrier tracking number | YES | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PREPARING/SHIPPED/IN_TRANSIT/DELIVERED | NO | | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Sales Order | **Key Attributes**:
- Tracking number | **Key Attributes**:
- Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

entities_post_resolution.name: Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A line item is a single entry on a Sales Order representing a specific product and its quantity.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Product | **Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A single line item in a Sales Order that records a product, its quantity, and unit price for that order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
ORDER_LINE_ITEM

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order. | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | Must contain at least one Order Line Item | Definition: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Payment is a financial transaction recorded to settle a Sales Order, linked to exactly one Sales Order and with an amount field.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Sales Order | **Key Attributes**:
- Payment amount | **Key Attributes**:
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: A sales order is a business document representing a customer's request to purchase goods or services, referencing exactly one customer and containing at least one order line item.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
KEY Attributes:
- References exactly one Customer | Must contain at least one Order Line Item | Definition: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products. | Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED | **Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Sales Order | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Customer Relationships:
- A Customer places zero or more Sales

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Address
entities_post_resolution.definition: An address associated with a customer that is used for shipping and delivery fulfillment.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | KEY ATTRIBUTES - Unique Customer ID | KEY ATTRIBUTES:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login) | KEY ATTRIBUTES:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | KEY ATTRIBUTES:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)
- One or more delivery/billing addresses
- Geographic region for tax calculation | KEY ATTRIBUTES:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)
- One or more delivery/billing addresses
- Geographic region for tax calculation
- Active/inactive status | Business Rules:
- Must place at least one order to remain active | Business Rules:
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | Customer Relationships:
- A Customer places zero or more Sales Orders | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly o

entities_post_resolution.name: Line 1
entities_post_resolution.definition: Line 2 represents a USB cable product item listed for sale in the catalog.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each | - Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50

entities_post_resolution.name: Delivery/Billing Addresses
entities_post_resolution.definition: An attribute representing all of a customer’s addresses used for delivery and billing, allowing multiple addresses with one primary address for each type (delivery or billing).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
KEY ATTRIBUTES:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | Business Rules:
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: A reimbursement issued to a customer, typically resulting from order cancellation or a product return.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: Exactly One Category
entities_post_resolution.definition: A KEY attribute constraint specifying that an item belongs to exactly one Category.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
KEY Attributes:
- Belongs to exactly one Category | KEY Attributes:
- References exactly one Customer

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer information including identifiers, contact details, regional segmentation, account status, and the date the customer record was created.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about products, including identifiers, naming, categorization, pricing, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores product category information, including hierarchical relationships between categories via parent category.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores header information for sales orders, including customer, date, amounts, status, and timestamps for payment, delivery, and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores the line items for each order, detailing the product, quantity, unit price, and line total amount.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments made for customer orders, including the method, amount, status, and timestamps for confirmation and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records for individual shipments tied to customer orders, including warehouse origin, shipment timestamp, tracking information, and shipment status.
